title: Radiance+
description: An extremely radical and broken attempt to optimize Minecraft for gpus with the radiance mod similer to my threaded pack ment to optimize Minecraft for the CPU with high hopes for this to no longer be broken in the future
body:
This modpack is an attempt to optimize and use the full power of **modern nvidia GPUs** for mincraft using the [ Radiance](https://github.com/Minecraft-Radiance/Radiance) mod as well as other basic optimization mods that are compatible with it the goal is to be able to use the entirety of your GPU instead of just a small percent of it minecraft would usually use. However this mod/modpack is **extremely broken currently** but has high potential. It features dlls and has the ability to actually **use Ray tracing cores** on your gpu using real RTX technologies **instead** of [software side ray tracing](https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/whats-the-difference-between-hardware-and-software-accelerated-ray-tracing/) making lighting more realistic and potentially super optimized later.

Requirements: Nvidia GPU with RTX branding,
windows 11 or 10,
Nvidia GPU with up-to-date drivers,
[the latest Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cpp/windows/latest-supported-vc-redist?view=msvc-170) and [java 22-25](https://www.azul.com/downloads/?package=jdk#zulu)
